title: Callista chrysotoxa
taxonomy: I can find information about Callista chrysotoxa. Callista chrysotoxa is a species of sea snail, a marine gastropod mollusk in the family Veneridae. It is a type of Venus clam, commonly found in tropical waters. This species belongs to the genus Callista, which includes other species of Venus clams. The classification of Callista chrysotoxa is as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Mollusca, Class: Bivalvia, Order: Veneroida, Family: Veneridae, Genus: Callista, Species: C. chrysotoxa.
